readout_causation_gap_summary.message: Causal intervention track remains unresolved for GPT-2 at high coverage; decoded arithmetic readouts do not yet provide reliable faithfulness discrimination.

faithfulness_alignment_limitations.claim_boundary: Track C claims are limited to measured variables/subspaces and tested interventions; no full reasoning-completeness claim.

claim_boundary_disclaimer: Causal support scores reflect measured variables/subspaces and tested interventions only; they are not a complete explanation of all internal reasoning.
scope_disclaimer: No direct natural-language CoT generalization claim: this benchmark run uses synthetic controls.
